_comment: Synthetic seed data for the MemStore mock. No real PII. Single 'workspace' collection with 24 documents across categories invoice/note/contact.

documents.content: Invoice #1001 for Acme Robotics — cloud compute, March.
Invoice #1002 for Globex — annual support renewal.

Meeting note: kickoff with design team, agreed on IA milestones.
Note: agents fail 25% of tasks when the metadata filter is undocumented.
Retro note: shipped the audit tool in 7 minutes flat.
Note: remember to document the next_cursor pagination field.
Standup note: verification pipeline green across all samples.
Note: X-MemStore-Key is the correct auth header, not Bearer.
Planning note: zero-to-aha journey killed 70% of confusion.
Note: SQL-style filtering boosted answer success by 30%.
